slides.headline: Simplify Transfer Veteran Certifications
slides.body: Streamline GI Bill and Chapter 33 claims for seamless student transitions.

slides.headline: Identify Eligible Veterans
slides.body: Screen incoming students for eligibility under Chapter 33 and GIBill.

slides.headline: Gather Required Documentation
slides.body: Collect necessary paperwork for GI Bill and Chapter 33 claims.

slides.headline: Submit Certifications
slides.body: Upload necessary forms and submit to VA for processing.
bullets: Use VA School Certifying Official Portal

slides.headline: Monitor and Support
slides.body: Stay updated on claims and support students throughout the certification process.

slides.headline: Maintain Records
slides.body: Keep accurate records for future reference and audits.

outline.caption: Simplify the transfer veteran certification process with VASCO Assistant Pro. Identify eligible veterans, gather required documentation, submit certifications, monitor and support, and maintain records. Ready to start? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5 of 5, which could benefit from a more engaging headline to keep the viewer's interest.
